title_vi: Bí Mật Đáng Ngờ Của Thợ Mỏ
source_case: EN-asset-is-English (message fields English; title field JP)

characters.ダリア (Daria): Thợ mỏ trẻ, ít nói, mê đá quý; self-ref em; calls 親方/司令官 -> sếp; kept speaker label ダリア
characters.<user> (Commander/親方): Chỉ Huy; nam; sếp/Chỉ Huy; addresses Daria as em
characters.兵士Ａ / 兵士Ｂ: binh sĩ; xưng tôi with Chỉ Huy; kept JP speaker labels

addressing_notes: 親方 (Boss/foreman) -> 'sếp' in dialogue; 司令官/Commander -> Chỉ Huy; Daria uses em, Commander uses tôi/em toward her.
delimiter_handling: ASCII commas inside VI text replaced with U+201A ‚; build asserts no ASCII comma in translated fields.

intentional_localizations: SFX localized to VI onomatopoeia: Clink->Coong, Clatter->Loảng xoảng, knock->Cốc cốc, click->Cạch, Zzz->Khò, *huff*->Hì hục, *yawn*->Hoááp
